title: 3D Projectile Visualizer
desc: A comprehensive 3D simulation of kinematics in varying atmospheric conditions.
objective: Model and visualize projectile motion in 3D space with adjustable air resistance and gravity vectors.
observation: High-velocity simulations reveal significant deviations from parabolic paths when drag coefficients are non-linear.
conclusion: Real-time 3D visualization aids in the intuitive understanding of complex drag effects.
